chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 5015 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.3654/2025. 2. For orders as to maintainability of petition. 21.02.2025 Mr. Qamar Iqbal, advocate for the petitioner. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. 1. Urgency granted. 2. This petition has been filed ostensibly aggrieved of a suspension of license etc of a private limited company. The suspension letter is available at page 111 of the court file. The letter is addressed to and in respect of a private limited company, however, such entity is not petitioner before us. Locus standi in context of aggrieved person could not be demonstrated. Secondly, the order under reference has not been impugned in the prayer clause and notwithstanding the same, no cause for interference in writ jurisdiction has been made out. Letter under reference and action taken by the SECP as well as the Ministry of Religious Affairs is on the basis of some management dispute. Even though the action of the respective authorities are assailable under relevant enactments, no case is made out to entertain the management dispute in writ as no determination is possible without evidence etc. Petition is found to be misconceived, hence, dismissed. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
